raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent successfully identified the load-bearing concept of commitment and reframed the text to improve clarity and logical flow.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.6": "The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved writing polish.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., PPO/CMDP inference timing), but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no scope drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., repetition, unclear phrasing).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent successfully identified the load-bearing concept of commitment and reframed the text to improve clarity and logical flow.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., PPO/CMDP inference timing), but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., repetition, unclear phrasing).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
